direction: أستوديو بث رياضي - High-end football TV broadcast graphics package.

typography.rules: Use Changa for all heavy headers, scoreboards, and the news ticker to give that squared, masculine, broadcast-sports feel. Use Tajawal for readable UI elements, menus, and paragraphs.

colors.rules: Avoid AI-slop purple gradients. Stick to strict broadcast aesthetics: solid blacks/obsidians, stark whites, and hyper-visible solid red (#FF2244) for LIVE accents.

layouts.general: RTL (Right-to-Left) first. Use 'dir=rtl' on the root HTML. Grid-heavy, dense, and compartmentalized like a TV studio monitor wall.
layouts.hero_scoreboard: A prominent scoreboard spanning full width, imitating a live TV scorebug. Minimalist, high contrast, avoiding muddy 3D gradients in favor of sharp flat colors or extremely subtle 1px glass borders.
layouts.news_ticker: Fixed at the bottom of the viewport or just below the header. Must span 100% width, black background with bold red 'مباشر' (LIVE) badge on the right, and continuous scrolling text to the left.
layouts.bento_grids: For Newspapers and Clubs. Use 1px borders (border-white/10) with solid surface backgrounds, hover effects that lift the card and add a subtle glow.
layouts.player_cards: Magazine-style. Tall cards. Background is a dark stadium image or solid dark color, with player cutout breaking out of the top/bottom frame slightly. Giant typography of the player's number or name behind the cutout.

news_ticker.wrapper: fixed bottom-0 w-full h-12 bg-black border-t border-white/10 flex items-center overflow-hidden z-50
news_ticker.live_badge: bg-[#FF2244] text-white px-6 h-full flex items-center font-bold text-lg z-10 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(255,34,68,0.5)]
news_ticker.scroll_track: flex-1 overflow-hidden relative h-full flex items-center
news_ticker.scroll_text: whitespace-nowrap animate-marquee text-white/90 font-changa text-lg mx-4

club_card.wrapper: relative group flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-6 bg-[#121316] border border-white/5 rounded-xl hover:border-white/20 transition-all duration-300 overflow-hidden cursor-pointer
club_card.logo: w-20 h-20 object-contain z-10 transition-transform duration-300 group-hover:scale-110
club_card.glow: absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-t from-white/5 to-transparent opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity

newspaper_card.wrapper: relative group block aspect-[3/4] bg-[#121316] rounded-xl overflow-hidden cursor-pointer border border-white/10
newspaper_card.overlay: absolute inset-0 bg-black/60 group-hover:bg-black/40 transition-colors z-10 flex flex-col justify-end p-4
newspaper_card.action_button: mt-3 bg-[#FF2244] text-white py-2 px-4 rounded text-sm font-bold opacity-0 translate-y-4 group-hover:opacity-100 group-hover:translate-y-0 transition-all duration-300 flex justify-center items-center gap-2

scoreboard_bug.wrapper: flex items-center justify-between bg-[#121316] border border-white/10 rounded-lg overflow-hidden max-w-2xl mx-auto
scoreboard_bug.score_block: bg-black px-6 py-4 text-3xl font-changa font-bold text-white
scoreboard_bug.status_badge: bg-[#FF2244] text-white text-xs font-bold px-2 py-1 uppercase tracking-widest

motion.transitions: Fast and snappy. 200ms-300ms. TV broadcasts don't have slow, floaty animations.
motion.ticker: Continuous linear translation (marquee) for the news ticker. Use CSS animation: @keyframes marquee { 0% { transform: translateX(100%); } 100% { transform: translateX(-100%); } }
motion.hover: Scale up slightly (scale-105), increase border opacity, and add a subtle box-shadow glow using the accent color.
motion.page_load: Staggered fade-up for grid items. The scoreboard should slide down from the top.

backgrounds.description: Dark stadium filled with people, ideal for hero section background with heavy black gradient overlay.

players.description: Football player in action - use as cutout for 'Global Stars' section
Man playing soccer - use as cutout for 'Global Stars' section

newspapers.description: Sports newspaper cover for the 'Newspapers Grid'

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a self-contained HTML file (Single-file hybrid dashboard) as requested by the user. Do NOT split into React components unless strictly enforcing standard environment setup, but prioritize a single file with vanilla CSS/JS if possible based on the user's explicit prompt.
Include Tailwind CSS via CDN (e.g., <script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>) if going the single HTML file route.
Configure Tailwind in the head to include the custom colors and fonts specified in this JSON.
This must be an RTL-first interface. Add dir='rtl' to the html tag and apply 'lang="ar"'.

Embrace the 'TV Studio Broadcast' aesthetic (أستوديو بث رياضي). It should feel like a premium sports channel (beIN Sports, Sky Sports). Use high contrast (obsidian base + stark white text + intense red live accents).
Replace text club names with actual team logos in the grid. If you lack specific logos, use CSS to create a premium monogram or shield placeholder.

Implement the live news ticker as a fixed element at the bottom of the screen. It should have a red 'عاجل' or 'مباشر' block on the right, and scrolling text to the left. Use vanilla JS or CSS animations for the scroll.
For the 'Newspapers grid', hovering over a newspaper should reveal a glowing 'تصفح مترجماً للعربية' (Browse translated to Arabic) button.
Include a prominent Scoreboard component (نتائج ومواعيد المباريات مباشرة). It should mimic TV scorebugs (team logos, scores, match time like 'Live 75' or 'FT').
The UI is a single page application. Handle navigation via vanilla JS to toggle active 'views' or scroll to sections (Trending News, Newspapers, Saudi clubs, World clubs, Global stars, Live TV).
Integrate a live clock and geolocation weather as requested.
Live TV channels should open a YouTube player modal with forced Arabic subtitles and a 'geo-bypass' toggle style button overlay.
Add data-testid attributes to all interactive elements for testing.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do not converge toward generic outputs. Avoid simplistic gradients and AI slop.
Avoid centering layouts by default. Optical alignment over geometrical alignment.
NEVER use fully transparent backgrounds on headers or overlays over content.
Add hover and transition states to all interactive elements. A static design is dead.
Use sharp-edged buttons with micro-animations to fit the broadcast TV theme.
Create depth with layered elements and z-index hierarchy, use glass-morphism sparingly and purposefully (not muddy).
